title: U2 transaction
text: U2 transaction Enable U2.x transaction handling. USYS$SYB_PARAMS = U2 transaction Description When this option is set, the U4.x Sybase connector always begins a transaction upon Insert , Update , Delete and Lock , regardless of the Sybase @@trancount variable. This enables the U2.x transaction handling. CAUTION: Use this option only if the database does not use chained transactions. For more information, see Transaction Control on Sybase . Related Links Transaction Control on Sybase Both commit and rollback instruction are fully supported by Sybase. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
